children.text: a suspension for more than 14 days;
a furlough of 30 days or less;

children.label: A
children.text: a suspension or removal under ,section 7532 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a reduction-in-force action under ,section 3502 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: the reduction in grade of a supervisor or manager who has not completed the probationary period under if such reduction is to the grade held immediately before becoming such a supervisor or manager,section 3321(a)(2) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: a reduction in grade or removal under ,section 4303 of this title

children.label: E
children.text: an action initiated under section 1215 or 7521 of this title, or

children.label: F
children.text: a suitability action taken by the Office under regulations prescribed by the Office, subject to the rules prescribed by the President under this title for the administration of the competitive service.
